Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A green turban shell from Yakushima...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have some great memories from the time[n]I spent in Yakushima with my friends...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A certificate that says,[n]"The 18th Annual Myouou Cup - Silver"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to my track and field summer practice,[n]I achieved a personal best at the competition.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a mask from the summer festival...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari and I walked around[n]and saw a lot of stalls...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a mask from the summer festival...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka and I walked around[n]and saw a lot of stalls...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a mask from the summer festival...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko and I walked around[n]and saw a lot of stalls...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a mask from the summer festival...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro and I walked around[n]and saw a lot of stalls...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a mask from the summer festival...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru, Aigis, and I walked around[n]and saw a lot of stalls...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a mask from the summer festival...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I walked around the lively festival by myself.[n]This brings back lonely memories...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the photo of everyone at the dorm[n]that we took together on November 4th...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone in the photo is smiling...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a model of a tower...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ryoji and Junpei were full of energy when we[n]visited Kiyomizu Temple on the school trip...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the doll from Christmas...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent time with Yukari on Christmas[n]and formed an unforgettable memory...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the doll from Christmas...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent time with Fuuka on Christmas[n]and formed an unforgettable memory...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the doll from Christmas...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent time with Yuko on Christmas[n]and formed an unforgettable memory...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the doll from Christmas...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent time with Chihiro on Christmas[n]and formed an unforgettable memory...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the doll from Christmas...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent time with Mitsuru on Christmas[n]and formed an unforgettable memory...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the doll from Christmas...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent Christmas this year quietly by myself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A New Year's decoration, a Hamaya arrow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The first shrine visit with my friends rekindled[n]my will to fight on the Promised Day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's nothing on the shelf yet...[n]{f 1 1}
